=== info file.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan 
The Roxy
Atlanta, Georgia
December 1 & 2, 1997 (soundchecks)

Source: unknown taper & equipment (appears to be the same as LB-3025)

Lineage: trade CDR > wav (EAC) > FLAC 6 (TLH) > HC

Sound Quality: fair

December 1, 1997 (32:20)
01. White Dove
02. White Dove
03. Cocaine Blues
04. Stone Walls And Steel Bars
05. You're A Big Girl Now
06. Million Miles
07. Standing In The Doorway (instrumental)
08. You Ain't Goin' Nowhere 

December 2, 1997 (22:46)
09. The Lonesome River
10. White Dove
11. Unknown (instrumental)
12. Seeing The Real You At Last
13. Seeing The Real You At Last
14. White Dove 
15. Unknown (instrumental)

Note: There are slight ticks between tracks 1 & 2, 6 & 7, 7 & 8, 9 & 10 and 11 & 12. If anyone
has a copy of this recording without these flaws, please consider uploading it.
